root.title: Pick a folder for your library
root.description: Klip will store videos, cuts, and metadata under this folder. You can change it later in Settings.

preferences.title: Make it yours
preferences.description: Set the look and language. Both can be changed any time from Settings.

tour.title: A quick tour
tour.description: Three things you can do right away.

download.title: Drop a YouTube URL
download.body: Paste or drag any video URL on the Downloads page — Klip fetches metadata, organises it under the creator, and queues the download.

organise.title: Organise by creator
organise.body: Each creator gets their own folder. Add tags, create collections, and reassign videos between creators when you change your mind.

search.title: Search transcripts
search.body: Find any moment someone said something. Press / to open the command palette, or g s to jump to full transcript search.
